parameters.name: X-Gusto-API-Version
parameters.description: Determines the date-based API version associated with your API call. If none is provided, your application's [minimum API version](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/api-versioning#minimum-api-version) is used.

parameters.name: starting_after_uuid
parameters.description: A cursor for pagination. Returns all events occuring after the specified UUID (exclusive). Events are sorted according to the provided sort_order param.

parameters.name: resource_uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the company. If not specified, will return all events for all companies.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of objects returned in a single response, between 1 and 100. The default is 25

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: A string containing the exact event name (e.g. `employee.created`), or use a wildcard match to filter for a group of events (e.g. `employee.*`, `*.created`, `notification.*.created` etc.)

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: A string indicating whether to sort resulting events in ascending (asc) or descending (desc) chronological order. Events are sorted by their `timestamp`. Defaults to asc if left empty.
